creator: tmseck@netcologne.de
text:
This looks like something went very wrong[tm] when the port was
patched up from squid26 to squid30: files/patch-src-cf.data.pre
should only contain one hunk, not two. I learned that patch(1) likes
to choke on the large ICAP related patches, maybe this has been the
case here, too.

I sent a copy of files/patch-src-cf.data.pre from my development tree
to miwi@ in a separate mail.
